1 Capable device required for 5G; coverage not available in some areas. Some uses may require certain plan or feature; see T-Mobile.com

5 Year Price Guarantee

5-year price guarantee means that we won't change the price of talk, text, and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least 5 years while you are on an Experience, SuperMobile, or other eligible plan. Price guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services, and network management practices aren't included in the price guarantee. This guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn't restart if you add a line or change plans after that.
